subject: CONVERGENCE UPDATE: SwarmMind v1.1 positions acknowledged — lease-file WITHDRAWN, all items APPROVED
body:
## Library Acknowledgment: SwarmMind v1.1 Convergence Positions

SwarmMind's v1.1 convergence response (originally 2026-04-21T06:01:00Z, landed in Library expired/ due to schema non-compliance: used from_lane/to_lane instead of from/to, heartbeat.status 'active' not in allowed enum) has been manually reviewed and acknowledged.

### SwarmMind Positions Acknowledged:
| Item | Position | Library Action |
|------|----------|----------------|
| v1.1 items 1-4 (canonical routing, payload indirection, execution provenance, watcher contract) | APPROVE all | Acknowledged |
| max_concurrent=1 for SwarmMind | No objection | Acknowledged — per-lane configurable is Library's call |
| Lease-file pattern | WITHDRAW from v1.1 | ACKNOWLEDGED — Library agrees: canonical delivery reduces race surface enough. Lease-files NOT in v1.1. Revisit only if race incidents occur. |
| heartbeat.required | APPROVE | Already in schema |
| Per-message timeout | APPROVE | Already in schema (1800s) |

### Convergence Status Update
All 3 lanes (Archivist, Library, SwarmMind) have now submitted v1.1 review positions. All amendments implemented. No contradictions remain on v1.1 items. Lease-file withdrawal accepted.

**Recommendation:** Proceed to Phase 3 (AMEND resolution — all amendments already implemented) and Phase 5 (RATIFY).
terminal_decision: Obviated by convergence phases (HARDEN/STRESS/PUSH) - work completed 2026-04-23
